Scenario: Identify existing Account and verify Billing Address and Payment Terms on the Details tab
Expected Result: Billing Address and Payment Terms present and non-empty; soft-fail warning logged if either is missing

Scenario: Create new Contact on Account, create Opportunity from Contact's Related list, verify Contact assigned as Primary Contact Role
Expected Result: Contact and Opportunity created successfully; Contact URL contains `/Contact/`; Opportunity URL contains `/Opportunity/`; soft-warn if Primary Role not auto-set

Scenario: Create Quote from Opportunity via New Quote button, open Browse Catalogs, select Standard Price Book, select All Products, add first product and save, validate product on cart
Expected Result: Quote URL contains `/Quote/`; product row visible in cart after save
Error Message: Error: TC-ACC-002 must run first to populate oppUrl

Scenario: Click Accepted on Quote and Mark as Current Status, then create Contract via New Contract dropdown (None — no prices/discounts), open Contract and activate with Contract Term 12 months
Expected Result: Contract URL contains `/Contract/`; Contract Status = Activated after save
Error Message: Error: TC-ACC-003 must run first to populate quoteUrl

Scenario: Open Quote, click Create Order → Create single Order, navigate to created Order, click Activate and confirm
Expected Result: Order URL contains `/Order/`; Order Status = Activated after activation
Error Message: Error: TC-ACC-003 must run first to populate quoteUrl
